Title: The Hunchback of Notre Dame II
FullTitle: The Hunchback of Notre Dame II
SortTitle: Hunchback of Notre Dame II, The
Plot: Now that Frollo is gone, Quasimodo rings the bell with the help of his new friend and Esmeralda's and Phoebus' little son, Zephyr. But when Quasi stops by a traveling circus owned by evil magician Sarousch, he falls for Madellaine, Sarouch's assistant.
